meaning: adj.丰富的,充裕的,丰富,盛产,富于
examples: There is an abundant supply of cheap labour.
I have ever had abundant love experiences.
Our country has a vast territory and abundant resources.
Some species have become so abundant that Etosha now re-locates animals to other parts of Namibia.
Other possibilities proposed were the distribution of water filters, and making better use of the region's abundant rainfall.
